name: lightning
description: Account-centric Lightning Network operations: open and close accounts, top up on-chain, pay BOLT-11 invoices, mint BOLT-11 / BOLT-12 receive invoices, withdraw via submarine swap, transfer between accounts, and inspect node/channel state. Backed by Core Lightning (clightning).

transport.notes: Plain JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST. No SSE / streaming on this server — the tool surface is request/response only.

auth.obtain: POST /.well-known/lightning/v1/accounts (no auth) — the response contains the account_id and the lt_-prefixed bearer token to use for every subsequent call.
auth.notes: Tools marked 'no auth' (node_info, node_health, channel_list, node_funds, fee_list, forward_stats, peer_summary, invoice_decode, price) do not require a bearer token.
